cues.text: 你喜歡什麼類型的書？
cues.tr: Lesson 8: What kind of books do you like?

cues.text: 聽說你很喜歡看書，你喜歡看什麼書呢？
cues.tr: I heard that you like reading a lot, what kind of books do you like to read?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我喜歡看小說，特別是武俠小說和愛情小說。你呢？
cues.tr: I like to read novels, especially martial arts novels and love novels. What about you?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我也喜歡小說，但是我更喜歡偵探小說。你覺得哪種類型的小說最好看？
cues.tr: I also like novels, but I prefer detective novels. What do you think is the best type of novel?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我覺得每種類型的小說都有意思，我喜歡故事內容又精彩又有趣的書。
cues.tr: I think every type of novel is interesting, and I like books with exciting and interesting stories.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那你有沒有什麼推薦的書？
cues.tr: Do you have any recommendations?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 最近我剛看完一本經典小說，故事情節非常吸引人。我建議你也看看。
cues.tr: I just finished reading a classic novel with a very attractive storyline. I suggest you read it too.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那本書的作者是誰？
cues.tr: Who is the author of that book?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 這本書的作者很有名，他得過很多獎，而且總是寫出很好的故事。
cues.tr: The author of this book is very famous, he has won many awards and always writes good stories.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 聽起來不錯，等一下我去書店買一本。
cues.tr: Sounds good. I'll go to the bookstore and buy a copy later.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 那你呢？你喜歡什麼主題的書？
cues.tr: What about you? What kind of books do you like?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我喜歡內容又有意思又有深度的書。你有沒有推薦的書呢？
cues.tr: I like books with interesting and deep contents. Do you have any recommendations?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 如果你喜歡有深度的書，我建議你看看一些自傳。
cues.tr: If you like deep books, I suggest you read some autobiographies.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我也聽說自傳類型的書是不錯的選擇。
cues.tr: I've also heard that autobiography-type books are a good choice.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 是的，我剛讀了一本非常好的名人自傳，內容豐富又感人。
cues.tr: Yes, I just read a very good autobiography of a famous person, which is rich and touching.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 太好了！那我也來讀讀看。
cues.tr: That's great! I'll read it too.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 你覺得這些書的情節重要嗎？
cues.tr: Do you think the plot of these books is important?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 當然很重要。如果故事情節又緊張又有趣，我會一直讀下去。
cues.tr: Of course it's important. If the story is exciting and interesting, I'll read it all the way through.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 完全同意。我這幾天看了一本書，情節很一般，所以沒看完。
cues.tr: I totally agree. I've read a book in the past few days, but the plot was so mediocre that I didn't finish it.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那你可以考慮我推薦的那些書，我相信你會喜歡的。
cues.tr: Then you can consider the books I recommend, I believe you will like them.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 好的，我一定會去看看！謝謝你的建議！
cues.tr: Okay, I'll definitely check it out! Thank you for your suggestion!
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 不客氣，選擇一本好書真的很重要。希望你能找到你喜歡的書。
cues.tr: You're welcome, choosing a good book is really important. I hope you can find a book you like.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我們下次可以再一起聊聊我們讀過的書吧！
cues.tr: Let's talk about the books we've read next time!
cues.speaker: B
